White Snake Invasion IIIThis page is currently a work in progress. Last updated: Exalt Version 5.6.1.0 (Jan 2025) Teleportation DisabledLimit of 20 player(s) Dust Drops 0 0 0 The White Snake Invasion III is an event dungeon consisting of a single boss fight against The White Snake. It was first introduced during Lunar New Year 2025. This dungeon can be accessed by consuming a stack of Divine Coins near Altar of the White Snake in The Realm. Key The White Snake Invasion III key was available from the Snake Invasion III Keys box in the shop for 299 per spin.
